ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the city */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the city is located */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the city is located */,
  "city_area" REAL /* Area of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES city_states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES city_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_stats" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education statistic */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the education statistic belongs to */,
  "high_school_diploma" INTEGER /* Number of people with a high school diploma */,
  "associates_degree" INTEGER /* Number of people with an associate's degree */,
  "bachelors_degree" INTEGER /* Number of people with a bachelor's degree */,
  "education_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the education statistic is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_stats_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internet_access" (
  "internet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each internet access statistic */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the internet access statistic belongs to */,
  "high_speed_internet" INTEGER /* Number of people with high-speed internet access */,
  "internet_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the internet type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the internet access statistic is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("internet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internet_access_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geolocation" (
  "geolocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geolocation */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the geolocation belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geolocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geolocation_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the session belongs to */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the statistic belongs to */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the statistic is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_stats_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_types" (
  "education_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education type */,
  "education_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the education type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internet_types" (
  "internet_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each internet type */,
  "internet_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the internet type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the internet type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("internet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "data_collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_data_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id")
)
